Lexi AI, an Ethereum-based token, uses AI to simplify and enhance the crypto experience for WhatsApp users.

intuitive tools  WhatsApp AI Trading Bot

Lexi AI: Enhancing
Crypto through
Whatsapp

Lexi AI makes blockchain accessible and user-friendly by integrating tools into WhatsApp.

What is Lexi AI?

Transforming Cryptocurrency Space

Lexi AI aims to transform the crypto space by making blockchain and cryptocurrency trading more accessible and user-friendly for WhatsApp users. Through AI-driven solutions and intuitive tools, it simplifies the user experience, empowering both new and experienced users.

Trade Anywhere Anytime

WhatsApp Crypto Trading

Find Lexi AIon

Utilities of
Lexi AI

Lexi AI features an ever-expanding suite of advanced tools and utilities, continually enhanced with cutting-edge technology, including but not limited to:

Lexi AI’s WhatsApp Assistant provides instant, accurate answers to any question, simplifying complex topics like cryptocurrency and more.

This advanced AI tool transforms the intimidating world of digital assets into an easy-to-navigate landscape, making it indispensable for both novice and seasoned investors.

Lexi AI’s WhatsApp Live Token Tracking provides instant access to token, coin, and index prices, integrating seamlessly into daily routines. This real-time information minimizes lag between market movements and user awareness, enhancing the user experience. It makes cryptocurrency navigation easier and more efficient, emphasizing the value of accessible, precise data for successful investing.

Managing a crypto portfolio can be complex, but Lexi AI simplifies it with its WhatsApp Portfolio Tracker. This innovative tool lets users easily monitor their crypto investments and gain valuable insights, enhancing portfolio management and investment outcomes. Integrated into WhatsApp, it offers unmatched convenience.

.In the dynamic & often volatile world of blockchain, security is of utmost importance. Lexi AI addresses this critical need by offering a robust Contract Audit feature directly within WhatsApp. This user-friendly tool enables users to audit smart contracts & detect potential vulnerabilities effortlessly, leveraging cutting-edge AI algorithms to ensure comprehensive security & protection against malicious activities.

WhatsApp Trading Bot

Trading cryptocurrencies can be complex, especially for newcomers. Lexi AI's Trading Bot simplifies this by allowing users to execute buy and sell orders through WhatsApp with easy, intuitive commands. Using commands like "buy" and "sell," the WhatsApp Trading Bot makes cryptocurrency trading accessible and straightforward for everyone. Users can send commands such as "/buy CA amount" to purchase tokens or "/sell CA amount" to sell them. The bot quickly executes these commands, helping users capitalize on market opportunities efficiently.

Sms to trade

Lexi AI's innovative SMS-to-trade feature allows you to trade cryptocurrency using regular SMS without needing an internet connection. This groundbreaking functionality ensures that you can conduct trades seamlessly, even in areas with limited or no internet access. By leveraging cellular networks, Lexi AI makes trading more accessible and convenient for users around the globe.

Supply 100000000 

09

Decimals

LEXI

Token Symbol

Use Cases

1. Simplified Cryptocurrency Navigation:

Lexi AI enhances the cryptocurrency experience with an intuitive WhatsApp assistant, using natural language processing to answer queries, guide users, & explain complex crypto terms, making it easy for anyone to navigate the crypto world.

2. Real-Time Token Tracking:

Lexi AI provides live Ethereum token prices via WhatsApp, offering real-time data for informed investment decisions.

  • API Integration: Connects to exchange APIs for seamless, real-time updates.
  • Data Parsing: Converts raw market data into meaningful updates.

3. Enhanced Security:

Lexi AI offers an advanced contract audit feature to verify smart contracts, ensuring they are secure & free of vulnerabilities, boosting user confidence.

  • Automated Security Audits: Scans for common vulnerabilities & coding errors.
  • Vulnerability Databases: Cross-references with an updated library of known issues.
  • Secure Processing Environment: Conducts audits in a secure, isolated environment to protect user data.

4. Streamlined Trading:

Lexi AI’s WhatsApp Trading Bot simplifies trading with easy buy & sell commands for quick, efficient transactions.

  • Command Parsing: Processes commands for accurate execution.
  • Order Execution Engine: Executes trades in real-time via blockchain.
  • Confirmation Mechanism: Provides instant trade execution notifications.

Roadmap

1. Phase 01:

  • Launch of Lexi AI token
  • Deployment of WhatsApp Assistant feature

2. Phase 02:

  • Release of WhatsApp portfolio tracker
  • Release Of Sms-To-Crypto Tool

3. Phase 03:

  • Launch of WhatsApp trading bot
  • Continuous improvement of AI algorithms and user experience

4. Phase 04:

  • Expansion of features based on community feedback
  • Exploration of additional integrations and partnerships
